blocks.text: FOR THE YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31 NOTE 2019 2018
(1) The details of securitized trade receivables are set out in Note 21, Debt due within one year .
The total amount of inventory subsequently recognized as an expense in cost of revenues was $3,141 million and $2,971 million for 2019 and 2018, respectively.
